flashcards.back: A measure of the level of prices of all new, domestically produced, final goods and services in an economy. Calculated as (Nominal GDP / Real GDP) x 100.

questions.question: If the covariance between X and Y is 15, and the standard deviations of X and Y are 4 and 5 respectively, what is the correlation coefficient?
What is the standard provisioning requirement for a Doubtful Asset (D1 category) for the secured portion?
questions.explanation: For Doubtful Assets up to 1 year (D1), the provisioning requirement for the secured portion is 25%.
